plan.failureSummary: The cached deterministic click action failed because the 'Select your occupation' combobox element was not present on the page. The survey form dynamically changed its fields (displaying 'Age Group' radio buttons instead).

remediationSteps.summary: Clear Page AI cache and retry the test
remediationSteps.details: Clear the page.ai cache and retry. Running page.ai autonomously will allow it to dynamically adapt to the 'Set 1' fields currently visible on the page.

remediationSteps.summary: Disable deterministic caching for this test case
remediationSteps.details: Configure page.ai in `unstable-survey.test.ts` to bypass or disable deterministic caching, as the target website renders different form layouts dynamically, making cached replays inherently unstable.

plan.notes: The flow history shows a perfect alternating pattern of SUCCESS and FAILED runs. This is because the survey form questions dynamically alternate between runs. A successful run saves a cache for one form layout, which then fails on the next run when the other layout is rendered. Clearing the cache allows the autonomous agent to dynamically adapt.
